convertToUint(int64,int32,uint8).details: Function will lose precision if targetDecimals is less than the Pyth price decimals. This method will truncate any digits that cannot be represented by the targetDecimals. e.g. If the price is 0.000123 and the targetDecimals is 2, the result will be 0

convertToUint(int64,int32,uint8).notice: Converts a Pyth price to a uint256 with a target number of decimals
